title: Email templates
intro: Here you can customize the subject, sender (From) and reply address (Reply-To) of the automatically sent emails. Empty fields use the respective default value from the code.
loadErrorHint: Email templates could not be loaded.
bodyPlaceholder: Leave empty for the default text …
bodyHint: HTML with placeholders. Empty = the system's default text. Leave empty for emails with dynamic content (e.g. tables).
defaultBodyHint: Source of the default template defined in code. Dynamic values appear as <%= … %> (inserted at runtime). As long as no custom text is set above, exactly this text is sent.
placeholdersHint: Available placeholders (usable in subject and body):
confirmReset: Really reset the customizations for "{{ name }}" to the default values?

notifications.loadError: Email templates could not be loaded.
